message:
refactor: cleanups across cx, observability, record, tls, and types

Minor cleanups and improvements across multiple modules:

src/cx/cx.rs:
- Import cleanup

src/observability/otel.rs:
- Additional error context for tracing setup

src/record/region.rs, src/record/task.rs:
- Refactor field access patterns for consistency

src/tls/connector.rs:
- Improve configuration validation flow

src/types/budget.rs:
- Simplify budget arithmetic

tests/repro_race_empty.rs:
- Test cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
